title: API: Create booking with valid payload returns 200 and matching bookingid
error: Expected HTTP 200 with bookingid + matching booking body. Observed HTTP 418 "I'm a teapot", body: "I'm a Teapot". POST /booking with payload {firstname: John, lastname: Doe, totalprice: 150, depositpaid: true, bookingdates: {checkin: 2026-08-01, checkout: 2026-08-10}, additionalneeds: Breakfast}.

title: API: Update booking with valid auth token returns 200 and updated values
error: POST /auth succeeded (200, token issued). Expected HTTP 200 with updated booking fields from PUT /booking/3 with Cookie: token=<token>. Observed HTTP 418 "I'm a teapot", body: "I'm a Teapot".

title: API: Get booking IDs with no filters returns 200 and full list
API: Get booking IDs with firstname/lastname filters returns only matching IDs
API: Update booking without valid auth token returns 403 Forbidden
API: Get non-existent bookingid returns 404 Not Found
